Das Skript hat Syntaxfehler - es fehlen die Anführungszeichen bei den Pfaden. Das ist ein altes Skript mit Fehlern. 

Ich sollte das nicht mit einem fehlerhaften Skript weiterführen. Stattdessen sollte ich einen manuellen Sync durchführen oder das HEARTBEAT.md aktualisieren, damit es das richtige Skript verwendet.

Da dies ein automatisierter Cron-Job ist und das Skript fehlerhaft ist, sollte ich:
1. Den Fehler dokumentieren
2. Das HEARTBEAT.md korrigieren, damit es das richtige Skript verwendet

content.text: Vault ist gesund. Führe manuellen Memory-Sync durch...

arguments.command: $sourceDir = ".\memory"; $targetDir = ".\SecondBrain\01-Daily"; $files = Get-ChildItem -Path $sourceDir -Filter "*.md" | Sort-Object Name; Write-Host "Gefunden: $($files.Count) Memory-Dateien"; foreach($file in $files) { $targetName = $file.Name -replace "^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})", "`$3-`$2-`$1"; $targetPath = Join-Path $targetDir $targetName; if (Test-Path $targetPath) { $sourceContent = Get-Content $file.FullName -Raw; $targetContent = Get-Content $targetPath -Raw; if ($sourceContent -ne $targetContent) { Write-Host "UPDATE: $($file.Name) -> $targetName"; Set-Content -Path $targetPath -Value $sourceContent -Encoding UTF8; } else { Write-Host "OK: $targetName (identisch)"; } } else { Write-Host "NEU: $($file.Name) -> $targetName"; Copy-Item $file.FullName $targetPath; } }; Write-Host "`nSync abgeschlossen."

# Memory: 2026-04-11

## Session Summary
Date: 11-04-2026
Focus: Vault Analysis, Skill Creation, Migration Safety

## Key Activities

### 1. Data Integration Analyst Skill Created
- Created new skill: `skills/data-integration-analyst/`
- 5-phase forensic analysis system for unstructured data
- Phases: Data Ingestion, System Archaeology, Comparative Analysis, Integration Decision, Validation
- Constraints: Read-only until Phase 5 approval, never assume tool availability
- Triggers: "analyze data for integration", "forensic data analysis", "data archaeology"
- Registered in registry/skills.yaml (count: 17)

### 2. Migration-Skill Activated
- Moved from vault-archive to `skills/migration-skill/`
- Foolproof migration with safety checks
- Features: Backup, Dry-Run, Batch processing, Validation
- PowerShell module: SafeMigration.psm1
- Registered and active

### 3. Vault Forensic Analysis Started
- Analyzed `vault-archive/Main_Obsidian_Vault/Kimi_Agent_OpenClaw GitHub/`
- 6 files analyzed in detail:
  - OPENCLAW_CLAWCODE_INTEGRATION_MASTERPLAN.md (26KB, ~800 lines)
  - SUBAGENT_COMPACTION_SPEC.md (11KB)
  - SUBAGENT_CONVERSATION_RUNTIME_SPEC.md (12KB)
  - SUBAGENT_PERMISSIONS_SPEC.md (10KB)
  - SUBAGENT_SSE_STREAMING_SPEC.md (9KB)
  - QUICK_REFERENCE.md (6KB)
- All 6 rated as HIGH quality, NOVEL content (80-95% new)
- Recommendation: 100% ADD to 03-Knowledge/References/

### 4. Session/Daily Note Fix
- Fixed misclassification: Sessions were in 01-Daily/
- Moved 4 Project-Sessions to 02-Projects/Completed/
- Moved 8 Decision-Sessions to 04-Decisions/
- 6 Daily Notes remain in 01-Daily/
- Discovered: 6 Daily Notes are empty shells (migration error)
- Documented in MEMORY.md under "Lessons Learned"

### 5. Areas → Responsibilities Migration
- Moved 02-Areas/ to 03-Knowledge/Responsibilities/
- Renamed: area-development.md → Development.md
- Renamed: area-research.md → Research.md
- Updated IDs: AREA-XXX → RESP-XXX
- Removed Emojis for terminal compatibility

### 6. New Safety Rules Added to MEMORY.md
- Rule 8: Migration-Validierung (3+ files sample check)
- Rule 9: Backup vor Löschen
- Rule 10: Content-Check bei migrated
- Rule 11: Dry-Run vor Migration
- Rule 12: Keine leeren Templates
- Documented migration failure (empty Daily Notes)

## Discoveries

### High-Value Files in Old Vault
- **MASTERPLAN**: 800-line integration spec for claw-code + OpenClaw
- **COMPACTION_SPEC**: Session compaction with ECC memory sync
- **RUNTIME_SPEC**: Agent loop with Fort Knox safety
- **PERMISSIONS_SPEC**: Risk-based permission framework
- **SSE_STREAMING_SPEC**: Real-time API streaming
- **QUICK_REFERENCE**: Condensed reference guide

### Issues Found
- 6 Daily Notes in 01-Daily/ are empty (content not migrated, originals deleted)
- This was a migration error from earlier
- Need to mark as "VERLOST" or reconstruct from OpenClaw logs

## Next Steps (Pending)
- [ ] Migrate the 6 analyzed files (after user GO)
- [ ] Continue Batch 2: Other vault directories
  - Kimi_Agent_OpenClaw Prompt Execution/ (11 files)
  - Master Rework 06.04.2026/ (6 files)
  - Root files (AI_AGENT_WORK_INSTRUCTION.md, etc.)
- [ ] Analyze PowerShell scripts (31 files)
- [ ] Check for duplicate Master Rework docs

## Decisions Made
- Emojis: BANNED (terminal incompatibility)
- Responsibilities: Moved from 02-Areas/ to 03-Knowledge/Responsibilities/
- Sessions: Strictly separated from Daily Notes
- Migration approach: Batch-by-batch with user GO after each
- Data Integration Analyst: Created as new skill (not merged)

## Key Learnings
- Parzival wants 100% analysis of ALL files, not just obvious ones
- Never assume: Always ask about Projekt vs Meta classification
- Empty files with "migrated" tag = DATA LOSS error
- Must validate file contents, not just metadata
- User prefers step-by-step (B) over bulk (A) for complex analysis
